hero.headline1: One API for mainstream global LLMs
hero.headline2: Lower cost, higher reliability, less integration burden
hero.subtitle: Use one OpenAI-compatible API for Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, and more. Smart routing and automatic failover cut integration complexity so your team can focus on the product.
hero.tagline: Streaming, tool calls, and hot-swapping models—fast iteration today, enterprise deployment and governance when you need it.
hero.trustLabel: Compatible with all major AI frameworks

features.title: Why OptRouter
features.subtitle: The unified entry for AI models—so your team focuses on the product, not wiring, switching, billing, and reliability fires.
features.item0Desc: Automatically pick a better-fit model by latency, cost, performance, and availability—with fallback.
features.item1Desc: Fully OpenAI API compatible—keep your SDKs and calling patterns; lower migration cost.
features.item2Desc: One API across major model vendors—less duplicate integration and long-term maintenance.
features.item3Desc: Streaming, high concurrency, and low-latency calls—built for real production workloads.
features.item4Desc: Centralized usage, cost, and performance visibility—make AI spend observable and controllable.
features.item5Desc: API keys, access control, isolation, and private deployment options for enterprise requirements.

painPoints.title: The hard part isn’t the first API call—it’s everything that comes after
painPoints.card0Desc: Different APIs, keys, billing, and call patterns—complexity grows with every provider.
painPoints.card1Desc: A single model outage or spike can take down your product experience.
painPoints.card2Desc: Which model each request should use is often a guess, not a policy.
painPoints.card3Title: No unified control plane for teams
painPoints.card3Desc: Permissions, usage, logs, and policies scatter across tools—hard to scale.
painPoints.closing: OptRouter turns fragmented access into one entry—and manual switching into continuous optimization.

valueOutcomes.title: Beyond unified access—continuously improve how you run AI workloads
valueOutcomes.item0Desc: OpenAI API compatibility means less rework for existing apps.
valueOutcomes.item1Desc: Smart routing matches each request to a better-fit model automatically.
valueOutcomes.item2Desc: Automatic failover reduces blast radius when a provider degrades.
valueOutcomes.item3Desc: One place for keys, traffic, billing, monitoring, and policy—not scattered ops.
valueOutcomes.closing: Unified access is the start; long-term value is cost, stability, and operations that keep improving.

comparison.title: Not just another gateway—an AI traffic control layer
comparison.col0Desc: Fragmented integrations, high switching cost—you own DR and unified ops.
comparison.col1Desc: Forwarding helps, but strategy and operations often stay shallow.
comparison.col2Desc: Unified access, smart routing, failover, billing, and enterprise controls—built for teams running AI in production.
comparison.footer: You don’t need “one more endpoint”—you need a layer that sustainably reduces complexity.

audience.title: Built for these teams
audience.card0Desc: Ship fast on multiple models with one consistent interface.
audience.card1Desc: Deliver reliable AI to customers without betting everything on one model.
audience.card2Desc: Govern cost, permissions, availability, and policy centrally.
audience.card3Desc: Gateway customization, provider onboarding, and enterprise-grade controls.

enterprise.title: Production isn’t only “can we call a model”—it’s “can we govern it”
enterprise.subtitle: Permissions, cost, and audit foundations for scaled operations.
enterprise.item0Desc: API keys, team permissions, and safe call boundaries.
enterprise.item1Desc: See spend and trends per model—plan with data, not guesses.
enterprise.item2Desc: Optimize for cost, latency, or stability—policy-driven, not tribal knowledge.
enterprise.item3Desc: Logs, alerts, tracing, and faster incident diagnosis.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Frequently asked questions about OptRouter
faq.q0: How is OptRouter different from calling OpenAI directly?
faq.a0: OptRouter is fully OpenAI API compatible—just change baseURL. On top of that you get smart routing, auto fallback, unified billing and usage stats to cut cost and improve reliability.
faq.a1: OpenAI (GPT-4o, GPT-4 Turbo, etc.), Anthropic (Claude 3.5 Sonnet, etc.), Google (Gemini Pro), DeepSeek, Qwen and more. We keep adding providers and models.
faq.a2: After signup you get an API key. Replace baseURL in your code with OptRouter’s endpoint and you’re done—under 30 seconds.
faq.a3: Pay per use in CNY; prices vary by model. View usage and costs in the dashboard. Free credits on signup (RMB), no credit card required.
faq.a4: We don’t store your conversations; requests are forwarded over encrypted channels. API keys are hashed; we support enterprise access control and data isolation.
faq.a5: The gateway picks the best provider and model by availability, latency and cost. If one fails, it automatically falls back so your service stays up.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: Sign up free and get ¥5 credit (CNY). No credit card. Cancel anytime. Same entry path from quick validation to production.
cta.enterpriseHint: Enterprise? Submit requirements for solutions and pricing.

contact.title: Contact us for integration advice, evaluation, and pricing
contact.subtitle: Whether you’re validating multi-model access or building an enterprise AI gateway and unified control plane, we can help with a practical rollout plan.
contact.point0: Private deployment / API gateway customization / provider onboarding
contact.point1: Help migrate existing OpenAI SDK / LangChain integrations
contact.point2: Enterprise-grade permissions, audit, billing, and risk control
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us your scenario, expected volume, and desired models/providers
contact.tip: By submitting, you agree we may contact you for business communication only.
contact.errorNetwork: Network error. Please try again later.

codeExample.title: Integrate in minutes
codeExample.sampleHint: Keep your calling patterns—change baseURL first, optimize later.
codeExample.subtitle: Fully OpenAI API compatible—just change baseURL to OptRouter. Works with OpenAI SDK, LangChain, LlamaIndex, from demo to production.
codeExample.subtitleNote: Example uses placeholder URL; for local dev use
codeExample.subtitleNoteEnd: , replace with your gateway URL in production.

testimonials.title: What teams say about OptRouter
testimonials.subtitle: Selected feedback from different scenarios
testimonials.card0Content: Once smart routing was on, our model bill dropped for the same traffic—we could pick models by outcome, not habit.
testimonials.card1Content: We only changed baseURL in the OpenAI SDK. Legacy code barely moved—lower migration risk than we expected.
testimonials.card2Content: A single console for usage and errors turned incidents from ‘guess the vendor’ into fast, shared diagnosis.
testimonials.card3Content: When upstream blips, automatic rerouting matters for us—fewer night pages and clearer ownership.
testimonials.card4Content: I hated juggling keys and dashboards across providers—one entry and unified metering let me focus on the product.
testimonials.card5Content: We’re evaluating private deployment and audit trails—a unified gateway fits group policy better than each line of business wiring vendors alone.

dashboard.modelsPageDesc: Available models, pricing, and context limits
dashboard.modelsVirtualHint: Use virtual names like auto, eco, balanced for smart routing. See docs.
dashboard.onboardingDesc: Create an API key to call models, try the Playground, or read the API docs to integrate.
dashboard.passwordMinLength: New password must be at least 6 characters
dashboard.noKeysHint: No API Keys yet. Create one to get started
dashboard.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke this API Key?
dashboard.keyCreatedHint: Copy your API Key now. It will only be shown once.
dashboard.createKeyDesc: Set name, per-minute rate limit, monthly request cap, and allowed models (empty = no limit). Virtual tiers like eco/balanced are always allowed.
dashboard.allowedModelsPlaceholder: One per line or comma-separated; empty = all models
dashboard.name: Name

analytics.failureAlert: {total} abnormal requests this period ({errors} failed, {limited} rate limited)

dataExport.title: Data export
dataExport.usageDataDesc: API call records: model, tokens, cost, latency, etc.
dataExport.transactionsDesc: Recharge, usage, refund and all transaction records
dataExport.footerHint: Exported as CSV. Open with Excel or Google Sheets. Large exports may take a few seconds.

docs.gatewayIntro: OptRouter Gateway is an OpenAI-compatible gateway; set base_url to the gateway address to connect.
docs.authDesc: All requests must include an API Key in the Header:
docs.apiKeyCreateHint: Create API Keys in the console under API Keys; format starts with sk-.
docs.modelDesc: Model name; physical or virtual tier: eco/balanced/premium/code/reasoning/longctx/auto
docs.messagesDesc: Messages array with role (system/user/assistant) and content
docs.streamDesc: true for SSE stream, false for full JSON
docs.smartRoutingDesc: Set model to a tier name for automatic model selection:
docs.strategyHint: Or add header X-Opt-Strategy: intelligent to allow downgrade for simple tasks.
docs.err401Suggestion: Check Authorization header and key format
docs.err403Suggestion: Create a new API Key in console
docs.err400Suggestion: Check model, messages and required fields
docs.err402Suggestion: Top up in console and retry
docs.err429Suggestion: Retry after a short delay (exponential backoff)
docs.retrySuggestion: For 429/502, implement retry with exponential backoff (e.g. 1s, 2s, 4s).
docs.requestIdHeader: Request trace ID; matches the Request ID column in analytics for troubleshooting.
docs.playgroundHint: Try chat completions in the console Playground without local curl.

playground.title: API Playground
playground.desc: Paste your API key to test chat online. Requests go through the web proxy to the gateway; billing is gateway-only (no duplicate usage logs).
playground.apiKeyHint: Stored in sessionStorage only for this browser session.
playground.promptRequired: Select a model and enter a message
playground.noModels: No models available — see Models catalog

promo.step1Desc: Register for free and get your invite code
promo.step2Desc: Send your invite link via WeChat, social media, or any platform
promo.step3Desc: When a friend registers via your link and tops up, you get ¥20
promo.shareDesc: Pick your way to share — copy and send
promo.rule1: ¥20 balance reward for each friend who registers and completes first top-up
promo.rule2: No limit on invites or total rewards
promo.rule3: Rewards credit in real time; use for API calls
promo.rule4: Friend must register via your invite link or code
promo.rule5: Only the first top-up per friend counts; no repeat rewards
promo.faq1Q: When do I get the reward?
promo.faq1A: ¥20 is credited to your balance as soon as your friend completes their first top-up; no review.
promo.faq2Q: Is there a cap on invites?
promo.faq2A: No cap. Invite as many as you like; you get ¥20 for each friend’s first top-up.
promo.faq3A: Rewards are added as balance for API usage; withdrawal is not supported.
promo.faq4Q: How much must a friend top up to trigger the reward?
promo.faq4A: Any amount for their first top-up triggers the reward; no minimum.
promo.faq5Q: Where can I see invite history and rewards?
promo.faq5A: After login, go to the Invite page to see total invites, total rewards, and details.
promo.faq6Q: What API formats does OptRouter support?
promo.faq6A: Fully OpenAI API compatible; works with OpenAI SDK, Ollama, LangChain, etc. Change one baseURL to migrate.
